name: Name
app_title: Decision Support System for Corporate Zakat

project_title_ar: Decision Support System for Corporate Zakat Calculation
project_title_en: Decision Support System for Corporate Zakat Calculation
project_description: This application is a graduation project for the Master's degree in computer science, Intelligent Systems track.
footer_disclaimer: This application was developed for academic and research purposes; it does not constitute final legal or professional advice, but a tool to document corporate Zakat calculation methodology.
demo_note: This system is for academic and research use; fixed credentials are used for demonstration only.

no_companies: No companies. Start by adding one.

nisab_help: Minimum Zakat threshold equivalent to 85g gold value (company currency).

similar_name_hint: Name similar to another item – consider merging or distinguishing

methodology_rules_relation: Relationship between data, rules and scientific reference
methodology_intro: The calculation engine relies on accounting rules to distinguish zakatable from non-zakatable items and classify assets.
methodology_classifications_intro: The application classifies financial items into main accounting categories to determine the Zakat base.
equity_note: Equity does not enter the Zakat base; for accounting balance only.
